data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test-merge-to-main-version-bump-integration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump-integration.sh
- [ ] Integration test passes after Task 63b9-5261 implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump-integration.sh
- [ ] Test verifies final version is exactly two patch increments above baseline (behavioral assertion)
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sequential_merges_produce_two_increments\|two_increments\|baseline' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump-integration.sh
- [ ] Test verifies no conflict markers in version file
  Verify: grep -q 'conflict\|<<<<<<' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump-integration.sh
